title: Research Radar — Wed May 13: Focus on AI Platforms and Multimodal Datasets Dominates Today
headline: Focus on AI Platforms and Multimodal Datasets Dominates Today
summary_text: Today's research highlights a strong emphasis on AI platforms and multimodal datasets, particularly for STEM reasoning and robotics applications. The Open-MM-RL dataset exemplifies the trend towards integrating visual information in AI models.
